item.title: iPod Disk Undelete [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: iPod Disk Undelete [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: datarecoverytools
item.itunes:summary:
iPod Disk Undelete
(Utilities)
iPod data recovery software retrieve and repair AAC, AIFF, WAV,M4A, Apple Lossless audio, audible, JPEG, TIFF, BMP, GIF, PNG images, MPEG-4 and Quick Time video files format. Software provides best recovery solution to fix and recover your lost and damaged audio video music file from your iPods. You can recover your deleted data from iPods mass storage media your self using iPod data rescue tool. Utility repair all your deleted files and folder from iPods and restore them to safe place of desired media. iPod portable media player data recovery software supports to all type of iPods including iPods mini, iPods nano, iPods shuffle, iPods U2, iPods first generation to iPods next generation series etc. iPod data recovery software provides data restoration support on various versions of windows operating system like Windows 11,Windows 10,Windows 8,Windows 7, Vista starter, vista home basic, vista home premium, vista business, vista enterprise and vista ultimate. There is no need of having technical knowledge to use this software. iPod data recovery tools is easy to use, non destructive and read only software to recover missing or misplaced music files and folders.Features:*iPod data recovery utility can recover deleted data from various type of music file like mp3, mp4, m4v, m4p, m4a, AAC, WAV,M4A, Apple Lossless audio, audible file format, JPEG, TIFF, BMP, GIF, PNG images, MPEG-4 and Quick Time video.*iPod data recovery software restores virus generated data lost or previously existing data lost in partition drive.*Ensures data recovery in case unrecognized disk partition volume by your system.*Provides data rescue support if data lost due to improper restoration or damaged file system.

[read more]
item.description:
iPod Disk Undelete
(Utilities)
iPod data recovery software retrieve and repair AAC, AIFF, WAV,M4A, Apple Lossless audio, audible, JPEG, TIFF, BMP, GIF, PNG images, MPEG-4 and Quick Time video files format. [read more]

item.title: Data Recovery Memory Card [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Data Recovery Memory Card [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: datarecovery1
item.itunes:summary:
Data Recovery Memory Card
(Utilities)
www.datarecovery.org.in presents high quality Data Recovery Memory Card application to salvage lost or misplaced digital photographs, screenshots, music files, video songs and text business documents from inaccessible card storage device. Successful Data Recovery Memory Card software is capable to successfully rescue damaged files and other personal folders like images, songs, movies clips in most significant manner without any data loss.

[read more]

item.title: Al Quran Tafsir and Audio [Education Apps]
item.itunes:title: Al Quran Tafsir and Audio [Education Apps]
item.itunes:author: ismailhosenjames
item.itunes:summary:
Al Quran Tafsir and Audio
(Education Apps)
All in one Al Quran App with Translation, Tefsir, Quran Audiobook & Notes Backup
Al Quran App has Multilangual Translation, Tefsir, Quran Offline Audio & Notes with Cloud Backup services all together. Al Quran app contains Translation of Quran in 69 languages. Al Quran App has 250+ books of Translation of Quran in different languages. Al Quran App has Tafsir of Quran in 6 languages with 30+ different books. Al Quran App has over 40 Reciter's Recitations. Al Quran App support audio caching and it helps to improve audio playback performance and ability to play offline audio. Al Quran App support background audio. This app have minimalistic and clean interface that is easy to navigate. This app is smaller size but have lot of documents. This is developed just for pleasure of Allah
[read more]

item.title: Mac Photo Recovery Free [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Mac Photo Recovery Free [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: undeletefilesmac
item.itunes:summary:
Mac Photo Recovery Free
(Utilities)
Professional data recovery software for Apple Macintosh OS X provides flexible solution to retrieve missing anniversary photographs from corrupted or logically crashed digital camera media storage drive. Cost effective data repairing software facilitates to restore deleted digital images from inaccessible memory card of camcorder without any requirement of prior technical knowledge. Image recovery software for Mac efficiently repairs virus infected media files with full support to various file extensions including jpg, jpeg, gif, tiff, bmp, mpeg, wav, midi and many others. Download data recovery software to successfully retrieve your missing precious photos from all major brands of digicam such as Sony, Nikon, Canon, Kodak, Samsung, Fujifilm etc. Technically designed Mac digital camera data salvage application has effective utility to retrieve formatted digital picture and save at user specified hard disk location for future reference. Comprehensive data revival software has integrated utility to restore missing video clips even when “drive not detected” or “drive not formatted” error message is displayed on your PC screen. Data doctor free photo restoration application facilitates to retrieve corrupted still picture from all types of digital camera including Point and Shoot camera, Professional camera, Specialty or Novelty camera etc. Software feature:* Photo recovery software for Apple Mac OS has disk scanning facility to efficiently search and restore desired misplaced photos from camcorder memory card.* Mac photo retrieval software efficiently salvage misplaced crucial still images with full support to long localized filename.* Free photo restoration program for Mac has interactive GUI wizard which facilitates layman users to salvage deleted digital photos.* Non destructive image recovery software facilitates to recuperate unforgettable wedding photos from inaccessible digicam.

[read more]
item.description:
Mac Photo Recovery Free
(Utilities)
Professional data recovery software for Apple Macintosh OS X provides flexible solution to retrieve missing anniversary photographs from corrupted or logically crashed digital camera media storage drive. Cost effective data repairing software facilitates to restore deleted digital images from inaccessible memory card of camcorder without any requirement of prior technical knowledge. Image recovery software for Mac efficiently repairs virus infected media files with full support to various file extensions including jpg, jpeg, gif, tiff, bmp, mpeg, wav, midi and many others. Download data recovery software to successfully retrieve your missing precious photos from all major brands of digicam such as Sony, Nikon, Canon, Kodak, Samsung, Fujifilm etc. Technically designed Mac digital camera data salvage application has effective utility to retrieve formatted digital picture and save at user specified hard disk location for future reference. Comprehensive data revival software has integrated utility to restore missing video clips even when “drive not detected” or “drive not formatted” error message is displayed on your PC screen. Data doctor free photo restoration application facilitates to retrieve corrupted still picture from all types of digital camera including Point and Shoot camera, Professional camera, Specialty or Novelty camera etc. Software feature:* Photo recovery software for Apple Mac OS has disk scanning facility to efficiently search and restore desired misplaced photos from camcorder memory card.* Mac photo retrieval software efficiently salvage misplaced crucial still images with full support to long localized filename.* Free photo restoration program for Mac has interactive GUI wizard which facilitates layman users to salvage deleted digital photos.* Non destructive image recovery software facilitates to recuperate unforgettable wedding photos from inaccessible digicam.

[read more]

Professional data recovery software for Apple Macintosh OS X provides flexible solution to retrieve missing anniversary photographs from corrupted or logically crashed digital camera media storage drive. Cost effective data repairing software facilitates to restore deleted digital images from inaccessible memory card of camcorder without any requirement of prior technical knowledge. Image recovery software for Mac efficiently repairs virus infected media files with full support to various file extensions including jpg, jpeg, gif, tiff, bmp, mpeg, wav, midi and many others. Download data recovery software to successfully retrieve your missing precious photos from all major brands of digicam such as Sony, Nikon, Canon, Kodak, Samsung, Fujifilm etc. Technically designed Mac digital camera data salvage application has effective utility to retrieve formatted digital picture and save at user specified hard disk location for future reference. Comprehensive data revival software has integrated utility to restore missing video clips even when “drive not detected” or “drive not formatted” error message is displayed on your PC screen. Data doctor free photo restoration application facilitates to retrieve corrupted still picture from all types of digital camera including Point and Shoot camera, Professional camera, Specialty or Novelty camera etc. Software feature:* Photo recovery software for Apple Mac OS has disk scanning facility to efficiently search and restore desired misplaced photos from camcorder memory card.* Mac photo retrieval software efficiently salvage misplaced crucial still images with full support to long localized filename.* Free photo restoration program for Mac has interactive GUI wizard which facilitates layman users to salvage deleted digital photos.* Non destructive image recovery software facilitates to recuperate unforgettable wedding photos from inaccessible digicam.

item.title: SanDisk Memory Stick Data Recovery [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: SanDisk Memory Stick Data Recovery [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: datarecoverytools
item.itunes:summary:
SanDisk Memory Stick Data Recovery
(Utilities)
Compact flash memory card files recovery tool rescue accidently deleted or damaged media files from all major brands of memory cards like Agfa, Apacer, Atech, ATP, AVB, Canon, Casio, Compaq, Corsair, Cyclone, Dycam, NEC Digimaster, EFilm, Edge, Epson, Ericsson, Everex, Fuji, Fujitsu, Hitachi, Hama, HP, IBM, Imation, Intel, IO Gear, JMTEK, JVC, Kingston, Kodak, Konica, Kyocera, Lexar, LG, Memorex, Microtech, Minolta, Mustek, Nikon, Olympus, Panasonic, Pentax, Philips, PNY and Polaroid. MMC mobile DV card files retrieval program retrieves BMP, PNG, GIF, CRW, CDRW, JPG, JPEG, TIFF, RAW, NEF, AVI, MOV, WAV, MPG, MPEG, mp3, mp4, m4a, m4v, m4b files from all types of corrupted memory sticks such as digital film card, DiskOnModule (DOM), FMM, Fire wire drives, iStick, memory stick Pro Duo, RS-MMC, MMC, PCMCIA, PC Card, Sandisk SD, secure digital card, MiniSD, Sony Magic Gate Duo, Transflash, microSD, xD Picture Card and Iomega Zip. M-card picture restoration utility restores lost images, snaps, audio, video songs, music, clips and movies from crashed multimedia card. Application provides the online data backup and fully compatible with windows including all version of Vista operating system. Application revives your data in case of system failure and software or hardware malfunctions.Features:* Recovers all types of media files from your corrupted or crashed memory cards.* Software has the attractive GUI facility that is helpful to understand and operate.* Supports all major brands of memory cards such as Sony, Samsung, Thosiba, Lexar, Siemens, Motorola and Nokia.* Rescue your inaccessible data when your device display an error message like drive is not formatted would you like to format it now?* Recoups picture, images, songs, music, word, text, doc, access, excel, PowerPoint and office files from your media device.

[read more]
item.description:
SanDisk Memory Stick Data Recovery
(Utilities)
Compact flash memory card files recovery tool rescue accidently deleted or damaged media files from all major brands of memory cards like Agfa, Apacer, Atech, ATP, AVB, Canon, Casio, Compaq, Corsair, Cyclone, Dycam, NEC Digimaster, EFilm, Edge, Epson, Ericsson, Everex, Fuji, Fujitsu, Hitachi, Hama, HP, IBM, Imation, Intel, IO Gear, JMTEK, JVC, Kingston, Kodak, Konica, Kyocera, Lexar, LG, Memorex, Microtech, Minolta, Mustek, Nikon, Olympus, Panasonic, Pentax, Philips, PNY and Polaroid. MMC mobile DV card files retrieval program retrieves BMP, PNG, GIF, CRW, CDRW, JPG, JPEG, TIFF, RAW, NEF, AVI, MOV, WAV, MPG, MPEG, mp3, mp4, m4a, m4v, m4b files from all types of corrupted memory sticks such as digital film card, DiskOnModule (DOM), FMM, Fire wire drives, iStick, memory stick Pro Duo, RS-MMC, MMC, PCMCIA, PC Card, Sandisk SD, secure digital card, MiniSD, Sony Magic Gate Duo, Transflash, microSD, xD Picture Card and Iomega Zip. M-card picture restoration utility restores lost images, snaps, audio, video songs, music, clips and movies from crashed multimedia card. Application provides the online data backup and fully compatible with windows including all version of Vista operating system. Application revives your data in case of system failure and software or hardware malfunctions.Features:* Recovers all types of media files from your corrupted or crashed memory cards.* Software has the attractive GUI facility that is helpful to understand and operate.* Supports all major brands of memory cards such as Sony, Samsung, Thosiba, Lexar, Siemens, Motorola and Nokia.* Rescue your inaccessible data when your device display an error message like drive is not formatted would you like to format it now?* Recoups picture, images, songs, music, word, text, doc, access, excel, PowerPoint and office files from your media device.

[read more]
item.content:encoded:
SanDisk Memory Stick Data Recovery
(Utilities)
Compact flash memory card files recovery tool rescue accidently deleted or damaged media files from all major brands of memory cards like Agfa, Apacer, Atech, ATP, AVB, Canon, Casio, Compaq, Corsair, Cyclone, Dycam, NEC Digimaster, EFilm, Edge, Epson, Ericsson, Everex, Fuji, Fujitsu, Hitachi, Hama, HP, IBM, Imation, Intel, IO Gear, JMTEK, JVC, Kingston, Kodak, Konica, Kyocera, Lexar, LG, Memorex, Microtech, Minolta, Mustek, Nikon, Olympus, Panasonic, Pentax, Philips, PNY and Polaroid. MMC mobile DV card files retrieval program retrieves BMP, PNG, GIF, CRW, CDRW, JPG, JPEG, TIFF, RAW, NEF, AVI, MOV, WAV, MPG, MPEG, mp3, mp4, m4a, m4v, m4b files from all types of corrupted memory sticks such as digital film card, DiskOnModule (DOM), FMM, Fire wire drives, iStick, memory stick Pro Duo, RS-MMC, MMC, PCMCIA, PC Card, Sandisk SD, secure digital card, MiniSD, Sony Magic Gate Duo, Transflash, microSD, xD Picture Card and Iomega Zip. M-card picture restoration utility restores lost images, snaps, audio, video songs, music, clips and movies from crashed multimedia card. Application provides the online data backup and fully compatible with windows including all version of Vista operating system. Application revives your data in case of system failure and software or hardware malfunctions.Features:* Recovers all types of media files from your corrupted or crashed memory cards.* Software has the attractive GUI facility that is helpful to understand and operate.* Supports all major brands of memory cards such as Sony, Samsung, Thosiba, Lexar, Siemens, Motorola and Nokia.* Rescue your inaccessible data when your device display an error message like drive is not formatted would you like to format it now?* Recoups picture, images, songs, music, word, text, doc, access, excel, PowerPoint and office files from your media device.

item.title: Cell Phones Recovery Application [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Cell Phones Recovery Application [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: pendriverecovery
item.itunes:summary:
Cell Phones Recovery Application
(Utilities)
Recovery of data from formatted mobile phone can be easy if you choose Cell Phones Recovery Software from right website. Data Doctor Cell Phones Recovery Software plays a vital role in order to rescue your mistakenly lost digital photos, pictures, wallpapers, documents and other media files from virus infected mobile phones. Software performs recovery of data even drive not detected error message visible on PC screen.

[read more]

item.itunes:author: datarecovery1
item.itunes:summary:
Data Recovery NTFS
(Utilities)
Reliable Data Recovery NTFS program quickly install on your laptop and easily download on www.datarecovery.or.in to retrieve your overall deleted, missing files information after accidental hard disk formatted and corrupted without any technical skills in few mouse clicks. Innovative restore PC program provides solution to recover overall NTFS files system corrupted, erased folders details after unexpected system shutdown in few minutes.

[read more]

item.title: Restore Deleted Mac Files [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Restore Deleted Mac Files [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: undeletefilesmac
item.itunes:summary:
Restore Deleted Mac Files
(Utilities)
Most widely used Mac digital picture recovery software is coming in market with extraordinary quality that allows user to take a complete backup of permanent corrupted memorable images, cute baby photo, marriage photographs, important files, mp3/mp4 songs, anniversary video, party clip etc and save them at safe location in desktop or at user specified another system. Resourceful Mac digital picture recovery application allows both technical and non-technical user to use such software without taking extra expertise training. Highly reliable Macintosh based digital camera lost photographs restoration utility is able to show a preview of recovered damaged files before actual regain of deleted data which saves time and money both in efficient manner. Restore deleted Mac files software allows user to save all recovers files, folders, audio, video, clip etc into different file format like Jpg, Jpeg, tiff, riff, gif, doc, txt, bitmap, mov etc in smooth way. Cost-effective image retrieval Mac program allows user to take a complete backup in case when data is lost due to different reasons such as human mistake, battery failure, improper handling of device, formatted/re-formatted memory card, software/hardware malfunction, virus/worms attack and many other same type of reasons. Amazing permanent corrupted Mac lost data recovery application supports restoration from different digital camera such as point and shoot camera, Digital video camera, Novelty camera, Speciality camera, Prosumer digital camera and many others. Features- * Safe and economical photo retrieval utility is used by different user to regain their damaged data in original form with high resolution. * Best and easy to operate Mac lost picture recovery software required minimum hard disk space to install software into personal computer. * Digital images restoration for Mac OS X supports all Macintosh based system like laptop, notebook, desktop, personal computer.

[read more]

item.title: Mobile Phone Pictures Recovery [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Mobile Phone Pictures Recovery [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: pendriverecovery
item.itunes:summary:
Mobile Phone Pictures Recovery
(Utilities)
New Mobile Phone Pictures Recovery tool is available at trusted/reliable web site www.pendriverecovery.org to quickly find out damage, spoil, infected and corrupted files from mobile directory. Mobile phone data restoration software provide inbuilt cell phone scanning technology to search missing data and restore user define location. Mobile file salvage program is fully capable to get back your text documents from logically crashed cell phone.

[read more]
